generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Just saw this in my neighborhood: a group of activists protesting against expanded security measures. They're blocking traffic, shouting slogans, and even harassing bystanders. It's getting out of hand! We need stronger domestic security powers to keep us safe from these disruptive elements. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurCommunities
